syntax_9627.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9627.title: Zombie Baby
syntax_9627.description: Checks whether the zombie is a baby.
syntax_9627.syntax_pattern:
%entities% (is|are) zombie baby
%entities% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) zombie baby

syntax_9628.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9628.title: Zombie Drowned Converting
syntax_9628.description: Checks if this entity is in the process of converting to a Drowned as a result of being underwater.
syntax_9628.syntax_pattern:
%entities% (is|are) converting to [a] drown[ed]
%entities% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) converting to [a] drown[ed]

en: Checks if this entity is in the process of converting to a Drowned as a result of being underwater.

syntax_9629.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9629.title: Zombie Villager Converting
syntax_9629.description: Checks if this entity is in the process of converting to a Villager as a result of being cured.
syntax_9629.syntax_pattern:
%entities% (is|are) converting [to a villager]
%entities% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) converting [to a villager]

en: Checks if this entity is in the process of converting to a Villager as a result of being cured.

syntax_9630.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9630.title: AI
syntax_9630.description: Returns whether an entity has AI.
syntax_9630.syntax_pattern:
set [have] (ai|artificial intelligence) of %livingentities% to %boolean%
set %livingentities%'[s] [have] (ai|artificial intelligence) to %boolean%

en: Returns whether an entity has AI.

syntax_9631.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9631.title: Apply BlockState To Item
syntax_9631.description:
Applies the block state of a block to an item.
This is how you apply a banner pattern to a shield. See examples

en:
Applies the block state of a block to an item.
This is how you apply a banner pattern to a shield. See examples

syntax_9632.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9632.title: Armour Stand Arms
syntax_9632.description: Set if the armour stands should have arms.
syntax_9632.syntax_pattern:
set [have] [armo[u]r stand] arms of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] [have] [armo[u]r stand] arms to %boolean%

en: Set if the armour stands should have arms.

syntax_9633.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9633.title: Armour Stand Base Plate
syntax_9633.description: Set if the armour stands should have base plates.
syntax_9633.syntax_pattern:
set [have [a]] [armo[u]r stand] base plate of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] [have [a]] [armo[u]r stand] base plate to %boolean%

en: Set if the armour stands should have base plates.

syntax_9634.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9634.title: Armour Stand Marker
syntax_9634.description: Set it the armour stands should have a marker. A marker means the armour stands have a small hitbox.
syntax_9634.syntax_pattern:
set [a[n]] [armo[u]r stand] marker of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] [a[n]] [armo[u]r stand] marker to %boolean%

en: Set it the armour stands should have a marker. A marker means the armour stands have a small hitbox.

syntax_9635.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9635.title: Armour Stand Small
syntax_9635.description: Set if the armour stands are small.
syntax_9635.syntax_pattern:
set small of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] small to %boolean%

en: Set if the armour stands are small.

syntax_9636.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9636.title: Armour Stand Visible
syntax_9636.description: Set if the armour stands are visible.
syntax_9636.syntax_pattern:
set armo[u]r stand visible of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] armo[u]r stand visible to %boolean%

en: Set if the armour stands are visible.

syntax_9637.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9637.title: Axolotl Playing Dead
syntax_9637.description: Set the playing dead state of a axolotl. The entity must be underwater and damaged.
syntax_9637.syntax_pattern:
set play[ing] dead of %livingentities% to %boolean%
set %livingentities%'[s] play[ing] dead to %boolean%

en: Set the playing dead state of a axolotl. The entity must be underwater and damaged.

syntax_9638.title: Bookshelf Occupied Slots
syntax_9638.description: Set if bookshelfs slots are occupied by books or not.
syntax_9638.syntax_pattern:
set [displaying|occupied] bookshelf slot[s] %numbers% of %blocks% to %boolean%
set %blocks%'[s] [displaying|occupied] bookshelf slot[s] %numbers% to %boolean%

en: Set if bookshelfs slots are occupied by books or not.

syntax_9639.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9639.title: Collidable
syntax_9639.description: Set the collidable state of entities.
syntax_9639.syntax_pattern:
set collidable [state] of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] collidable [state] to %boolean%

en: Set the collidable state of entities.

syntax_9640.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9640.title: Dispenser Dispense
syntax_9640.description: Attempts to dispense the contents of the dispensers.

en: Attempts to dispense the contents of the dispensers.

syntax_9655.title: Release Entities
syntax_9655.description: Release all entities from an Entity Block Storage.

en: Release all entities from an Entity Block Storage.

syntax_9656.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9656.title: Sculk Catalyst Bloom
syntax_9656.description: Get the bloom property of a sculk catalyst.
syntax_9656.syntax_pattern:
set [sculk [catalyst]] bloom of %blocks% to %boolean%
set %blocks%'[s] [sculk [catalyst]] bloom to %boolean%

en: Get the bloom property of a sculk catalyst.

syntax_9657.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9657.title: Sculk Shrieker Can Summon
syntax_9657.description: Get the can summon property of a sculk shrieker.
syntax_9657.syntax_pattern:
set [sculk [shrieker]] can summon of %blocks% to %boolean%
set %blocks%'[s] [sculk [shrieker]] can summon to %boolean%

en: Get the can summon property of a sculk shrieker.

syntax_9658.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9658.title: Sculk Shrieker Shrieking
syntax_9658.description: Get the shrieking property of a sculk shrieker.
syntax_9658.syntax_pattern:
set [sculk [shrieker]] shriek[ing] of %blocks% to %boolean%
set %blocks%'[s] [sculk [shrieker]] shriek[ing] to %boolean%

en: Get the shrieking property of a sculk shrieker.

syntax_9659.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9659.title: Set Camel Dashing
syntax_9659.description: Set if the camel(s) are dashing.
syntax_9659.syntax_pattern:
set dashing of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] dashing to %boolean%

en: Set if the camel(s) are dashing.

syntax_9660.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9660.title: Set Campfire Signal Fire
syntax_9660.description: Sets the value of the 'signal_fire' property.
syntax_9660.syntax_pattern:
set signal fire [state] of %blocks% to %boolean%
set %blocks%'[s] signal fire [state] to %boolean%

en: Sets the value of the 'signal_fire' property.

syntax_9661.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9661.title: Set Cave Vines Berry
syntax_9661.description: Get the berry state of a CaveVines.
syntax_9661.syntax_pattern:
set berr(y|ies) [state] of %blocks% to %boolean%
set %blocks%'[s] berr(y|ies) [state] to %boolean%

en: Get the berry state of a CaveVines.

syntax_9662.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9662.title: Set End Gateway Exact Teleport
syntax_9662.description: Set if end gateways will teleport entities to the exact location or a nearby location.
syntax_9662.syntax_pattern:
set exact location [teleport] of %blocks% to %boolean%
set %blocks%'[s] exact location [teleport] to %boolean%

en: Set if end gateways will teleport entities to the exact location or a nearby location.

syntax_9663.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9663.title: Set Ender Crystal Showing Bottom
syntax_9663.description: Set if ender crystals have a base showing.
syntax_9663.syntax_pattern:
set showing bottom [base] of %entities% to %boolean%

en: Set if ender crystals have a base showing.

syntax_9664.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9664.title: Set Horse Chest
syntax_9664.description: Set if a horse is carrying a chest.
syntax_9664.syntax_pattern:
set carrying chest of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] carrying chest to %boolean%

en: Set if a horse is carrying a chest.

syntax_9665.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9665.title: Set Minecart Slow When Empty
syntax_9665.description: Set if minecarts are to be slow when they're empty.
syntax_9665.syntax_pattern:
set slow when empty state of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] slow when empty state to %boolean%

en: Set if minecarts are to be slow when they're empty.

syntax_9666.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9666.title: Set Steerable Saddle
syntax_9666.description: Set if a steerable entity like a pig or strider have a saddle.
syntax_9666.syntax_pattern:
set [has [a]] [steerable] saddle of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] [has [a]] [steerable] saddle to %boolean%

en: Set if a steerable entity like a pig or strider have a saddle.

syntax_9667.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9667.title: Set Strider Shivering
syntax_9667.description: Set if striders are to be shivering.
syntax_9667.syntax_pattern:
set [strider] shivering of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] [strider] shivering to %boolean%

en: Set if striders are to be shivering.

syntax_9668.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9668.title: Set Visual Fire
syntax_9668.description: Set the visual fire state of entities.
syntax_9668.syntax_pattern:
set [is] (vi(ual|sibly [on])|on) fire of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] [is] (vi(ual|sibly [on])|on) fire to %boolean%

en: Set the visual fire state of entities.

syntax_9669.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9669.title: Signs - Editable
syntax_9669.description: Sets whether the signs can be edited by players.

en: Sets whether the signs can be edited by players.

syntax_9670.description: Sets whether the signs have glowing text.
syntax_9670.syntax_pattern:
set [sign] glowing text of %blocks% to %boolean%
set %blocks%'[s] [sign] glowing text to %boolean%

en: Sets whether the signs have glowing text.

syntax_9671.creator: LimeGlass

syntax_9671.syntax_pattern:
set vex charg(e|ing) of %entities% to %boolean%
set %entities%'[s] vex charg(e|ing) to %boolean%

en: Set if vexes are to be charging.

syntax_9672.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9672.title: Villager Sleep
syntax_9672.description: Attempts to make villagers sleep at a given location.

en: Attempts to make villagers sleep at a given location.

syntax_9681.syntax_pattern:
[the] (affected entities around|entities in range of) beacon[s]  of %blocks%

en: Get the secondary potion effect of a beacon.

syntax_9685.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9685.title: Beacon Tier
syntax_9685.description: Get the tier of a beacon.

syntax_9686.description: Gets the anger level of bee(s).

syntax_9687.description: Gets the ticks of how long bee(s) cannot enter hives.
syntax_9687.syntax_pattern:

%livingentities%'[s] cannot enter hive ticks

en: Gets the ticks of how long bee(s) cannot enter hives.

syntax_9696.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9696.title: Bundle Items
syntax_9696.description: Get or change the items inside a bundle. The bundle must start off as an ItemType.

en: Get or change the items inside a bundle. The bundle must start off as an ItemType.

syntax_9697.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9697.title: Campfire Cook Time
syntax_9697.description: Collect the total or current cooking time for a slot on the campfires. Not including the word 'total' is the current cooking time.

en: Collect the total or current cooking time for a slot on the campfires. Not including the word 'total' is the current cooking time.

syntax_9698.creator: LimeGlass

syntax_9700.creator: LimeGlass

syntax_9700.description: Get the candle count of a candle.

syntax_9701.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9701.title: Chiseled Bookshelf Occupied Slots
syntax_9701.description:
The slots that are occupied by books in a chiseled bookshelf.
If the maxiumum of the syntax is used, it'll be the max amount of slots that can be occupied, can't be set.
syntax_9701.syntax_pattern:
[the] [max:max[imum] number of] occupied slots of %blocks%
%blocks%'[s] [max:max[imum] number of] occupied slots

en:
The slots that are occupied by books in a chiseled bookshelf.
If the maxiumum of the syntax is used, it'll be the max amount of slots that can be occupied, can't be set.

syntax_9702.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9702.title: Collidable Exemptions
syntax_9702.description:
Gets a mutable set of UUIDs of the entities which are exempt from the entity's collidable rule and which's collision with this entity will behave the opposite of it.
For example if collidable is true and an entity is in the exemptions set then it will not collide with it.
Similarly if collidable is false and an entity is in this set then it will still collide with it.

en:
Gets a mutable set of UUIDs of the entities which are exempt from the entity's collidable rule and which's collision with this entity will behave the opposite of it.
For example if collidable is true and an entity is in the exemptions set then it will not collide with it.
Similarly if collidable is false and an entity is in this set then it will still collide with it.

syntax_9703.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9703.title: Combuster
syntax_9703.description: Returns the combuster of the event, either a block or an entity.

en: Returns the combuster of the event, either a block or an entity.

syntax_9708.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9708.title: End Gateway Age

The age of the end gateway.
This is used to determine when the beam is rendered.

The age of the end gateway.
This is used to determine when the beam is rendered.

syntax_9710.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9710.title: Ender Crystal Beam Target
syntax_9710.description:
The location ender crystal beams are pointing at.
Resetting this expression will make it not beam.

The location ender crystal beams are pointing at.
Resetting this expression will make it not beam.

[new] merchant recipe with result %itemtype%[,] [and] with %number% max uses (and|from) ingredients %itemtypes%

en: Create a new merchant recipe for villagers.

syntax_9744.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9744.title: Minecart Display Offset
syntax_9744.description:
How much to offset the minecart block display by.
A value of 16 moves the block up by exactly one multiple of its height.
Positive values move the block upwards, while negative values move it downwards.
syntax_9744.syntax_pattern:
[the] minecart display [block [data]] offset of %entities%
%entities%'[s] minecart display [block [data]] offset

en:
How much to offset the minecart block display by.
A value of 16 moves the block up by exactly one multiple of its height.
Positive values move the block upwards, while negative values move it downwards.

syntax_9765.description: Get the item used to steer a steerable entity such as a pig or strider.

syntax_9769.creator: LimeGlass
syntax_9769.title: Tropical Fish Pattern Colour

en: Grab the pattern colour of tropical fishes.
